title: lycium chilense var. filifolium
intro: Lycium chilense var. filifolium, also known as Chilean box or Chilean matrimony vine, is a variety of the Lycium chilense plant, a flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Lycium chilense var. filifolium include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
